title: Distribution build pipeline (linux amd64+arm64, windows amd64)
description: V1 rilis untuk **linux/amd64 + linux/arm64 + windows/amd64**, **macOS skip** (Apple Developer Program prematur, Gatekeeper friction; lihat ADR-0021). Cross-compile manual via scripts/release.sh vX.Y.Z di mesin dev (loop GOOS/GOARCH ~15 baris, output ke dist/), upload ke GitHub Release pakai 'gh release create vX.Y.Z dist/* --notes-file CHANGELOG.md'. **Versioning SemVer longgar** mulai v0.1.0 (per milestone progress) sampai v1.0.0 (semua slice lulus + smoke 3-target); pre-1.0 breaking change schema SQLite / profile JSON boleh tanpa MAJOR bump (V1 belum janji stabilitas). Versi di-inject via -ldflags '-X main.version=$VERSION', di-expose lewat GET /api/version + UI Settings/About. **CHANGELOG.md** format Keep a Changelog Bahasa Indonesia audience user akhir (mis. 'Tambah dukungan Sync Session yang bisa dibatalkan', bukan istilah teknis ADR); gh release membaca section terbaru. Flow rilis manual: edit CHANGELOG.md → git tag vX.Y.Z → git push --tags → ./scripts/release.sh vX.Y.Z → gh release create. **Tidak ada GitHub Actions V1**. Binary unsigned: Linux nihil friction, Windows SmartScreen 'More info → Run anyway' didokumentasikan di README dengan 2 screenshot bahasa awam (tidak menyebut 'code signing' / 'EV cert'). Landing page badge platform + catatan ramah 'macOS akan didukung versi mendatang, sementara bisa via Docker/Lima'. -ldflags '-s -w' cukup; **tidak pakai UPX** (trigger AV false positive Windows Defender). Smoke test 3 target sebelum tag.
acceptance_criteria:
scripts/release.sh: loop {linux/amd64, linux/arm64, windows/amd64} cross-compile
-ldflags '-s -w -X main.version=$VERSION' embedded
GET /api/version → {version, build_time, commit_hash}
UI Settings/About render version
CHANGELOG.md format Keep-a-Changelog Bahasa Indonesia user-facing
README dengan instruksi run + Windows SmartScreen workaround (2 screenshot)
README sebut macOS V2 + Docker/Lima alternatif
gh release create membaca section CHANGELOG terbaru
Tidak ada UPX, tidak ada GitHub Actions
Smoke test manual checklist 3-target: drop binary di folder kosong, jalankan, browser terbuka, SQLite tercipta, UI loads
File scripts/release.sh ≤100 baris
notes:
Blocked by: mariadb-magic-n60, mariadb-magic-qoh
Final integration milestone — wajib semua slice fungsional sudah closed.

title: Retention via capacity + incremental vacuum + Settings/Health page
description: **V1 retention berbasis capacity, bukan waktu** (override CLAUDE.md/PRD legacy 30-day). sync_logs cap 500.000 row (high) / 400.000 (low); sync_sessions cap 10.000 / 9.000. Eviction oldest-first via id ASC LIMIT N (autoincrement = proxy waktu, hemat index). Trigger: post-write async dari runner setelah rows_failed naik + time.Ticker 1 jam di internal/maint/retention.go sebagai safety net. **PRAGMA incremental_vacuum(N)** dipanggil setelah setiap eviction batch — tanpa ini file tidak shrink dan retensi gagal mencapai tujuannya (auto_vacuum=INCREMENTAL sudah di-set di 001_init.sql per slice migrations). CASCADE: session ter-evict ikut menghapus sync_logs milik session tsb (termasuk profile_snapshot_json-nya). **Export log CSV wajib disediakan** sebelum eviction manual: per-session di Sync Session detail + bulk di Settings/Health page; tombol manual 'Bersihkan log lama' **di-block** sampai user klik export atau eksplisit confirm. Tidak ada export otomatis. UI Settings/Health page menampilkan counter (sync_logs count, sync_sessions count) dan ukuran DB (page_count × page_size) sebagai transparansi pengganti kontrol konfigurasi. Tombol 'Bersihkan log lama' (manual eviction trigger). Bulk CSV export semua session. Test boundary: 499.999/500.001 row + post-vacuum page_count reduction + CSV round-trip (UTF-8 BOM untuk Excel Windows).
acceptance_criteria:
internal/maint/retention.go: EvictIfOver() dengan caps konstan
sync_logs cap 500k high / 400k low (evict 100k oldest)
sync_sessions cap 10k high / 9k low (evict 1k oldest, CASCADE logs)
Trigger 1: post-write async dari runner saat rows_failed naik
Trigger 2: time.Ticker 1 jam safety net
PRAGMA incremental_vacuum(N) setelah tiap eviction batch
GET /api/maint/stats → {logs_count, sessions_count, db_size_bytes}
POST /api/maint/evict tombol manual (gated behind export confirm)
/settings/health page render counters + DB size + tombol Bersihkan
Bulk CSV export endpoint GET /api/maint/logs.csv.zip atau per-session loop
Tombol 'Bersihkan log lama' disabled sampai export confirm
Test boundary: 499.999 row → no evict; 500.001 → evict ke 400k
Test: post-vacuum PRAGMA page_count reduction (page_count_before > page_count_after)
Test: CASCADE delete logs saat session evicted
Test: ticker safety net (mock time.Now / inject)
File ≤120 baris (split retention.go + vacuum.go)
notes:
Blocked by: mariadb-magic-x73, mariadb-magic-9ip
Catatan: CLAUDE.md masih sebut retensi 30-hari legacy — CONTEXT.md authoritative, ikuti capacity-based di V1.

title: First-run dashboard (three-card progress)
description: Dashboard kosong tampilkan **tiga shadcn <Card>** berderet sebagai roadmap: (1) 'Tambahkan Koneksi' — selalu unlocked di first-run; (2) 'Buat Mapping Profile' — locked sampai hasConnections (≥1 Source + ≥1 Destination); (3) 'Mulai Sync Pertama' — locked sampai hasReadyProfile (≥1 profile status='ready'). Card locked tampil disabled (opacity 50%, tombol non-interaktif, tooltip 'Lengkapi langkah sebelumnya dulu'). Card unlocked tampil CTA primer ('Tambah Koneksi', 'Buat Mapping Profile', 'Mulai Sync'). Copy per card maksimal 1–2 kalimat awam. Setelah hasAnySession true (sync pertama selesai sukses *atau* done dengan rows_failed), set tiga card dilepas dari dashboard — diganti **daftar Sync Sessions terbaru + tombol 'Mulai sync baru'**. **Tidak ada library tour** (Shepherd.js / Intro.js / Driver.js). State derivation di server: single endpoint GET /api/onboarding/state return {hasConnections, hasReadyProfile, hasAnySession}; frontend tidak query 3 list terpisah.
acceptance_criteria:
GET /api/onboarding/state → {hasConnections, hasReadyProfile, hasAnySession}
hasConnections: ≥1 Source + ≥1 Destination connection (perhitungan mempertimbangkan label/role bila ada; minimal 1 connection cukup di V1)
hasReadyProfile: ≥1 profile status='ready'
hasAnySession: ≥1 sync_session record (any status)
Dashboard route '/' default render tiga card kalau hasAnySession=false
Card 1 'Tambahkan Koneksi' unlocked default → CTA route /connections/new
Card 2 'Buat Mapping Profile' locked sampai hasConnections=true
Card 3 'Mulai Sync Pertama' locked sampai hasReadyProfile=true
Locked card: opacity 50%, button disabled, tooltip BI awam
Setelah hasAnySession=true → tampil daftar Sync Sessions terbaru (10 last) + 'Mulai sync baru' CTA
A11y: keyboard nav antar card, focus ring, tooltip ARIA
Test: state endpoint correctness untuk tiap kombinasi
Test: card lock state transition
File route ≤100 baris, components di web/components/onboarding/

title: CSV export per-session + per-group
description: CSV export sync_logs scope **per-Session** (bukan cross-Session) supaya profile_snapshot_json konsisten. **8 kolom fixed urutan**: waktu (ISO 8601 UTC), tabel_destination, pk_baris (JSON object selalu di-quote, mendukung composite PK), kolom_bermasalah, nilai_source (string repr; NULL = literal 'NULL' tanpa quote), kode_mariadb, pesan_teknis (raw MariaDB error), pesan_ramah (output ToFriendly). Tidak ada nilai_dest_existing, tidak ada rule_yang_aktif. **Encoding UTF-8 dengan BOM** (\xEF\xBB\xBF) untuk Excel-Windows. Quoting RFC 4180 (csv.Writer Go default). pk_baris JSON selalu wrapped. **Streaming write** ke io.Writer (HTTP response) — tidak load full result set ke memory; failure set 100k+ baris tidak spike RSS. Filename: magicsync-failures-{session_id}-{profile_slug}-{YYYY-MM-DD}.csv (slug = lowercase + dash, max 40 char). Per-group CSV (tombol di Sync Log UI accordion) memakai SQL filter WHERE session_id=? AND mariadb_code=? di repo, **bukan** filter client-side. Endpoints: GET /api/sessions/{id}/logs.csv (full), GET /api/sessions/{id}/logs.csv?mariadb_code=1452 (per-group). Content-Type 'text/csv; charset=utf-8', Content-Disposition 'attachment; filename=...'. Tidak ada .xlsx (binary cost not justified).
acceptance_criteria:
internal/api/logs_csv.go: streaming CSV writer
8 kolom fixed urutan + UTF-8 BOM prefix
GET /api/sessions/{id}/logs.csv full export
GET /api/sessions/{id}/logs.csv?mariadb_code=N per-group
Filter di SQL repo level (WHERE session_id + mariadb_code), bukan client-side
csv.Writer Go default RFC 4180 quoting
pk_baris JSON object selalu quoted, support composite PK
NULL value = literal 'NULL' string tanpa quote (special-case)
Filename slug ter-generate (lowercase + dash + max 40 char)
Content-Disposition attachment + Content-Type text/csv; charset=utf-8
Tombol 'Unduh CSV' di Sync Session detail (full)
Tombol 'Unduh CSV grup ini' di tiap accordion group (per-code)
Test: round-trip CSV (write → parse → assert 8 columns + BOM + RFC 4180)
Test: streaming tidak spike RSS pada 100k rows (memory profile)
Test: composite PK ter-serialize sebagai JSON object
Test: Excel UTF-8 BOM compatibility (manual smoke documented)
File ≤120 baris

title: Sync Log UI (group-by-mariadb_code accordion)
description: Sync Session detail tampilkan row failures **default group-by mariadb_code** via shadcn <Accordion>. Tiap group: count, ToFriendly summary, tombol 'Unduh CSV grup ini' (CSV slice berikutnya), expand → tabel **50 baris pertama** dengan kolom (Destination table, PK, kolom bermasalah, pesan ramah). Header group format: '{count} baris — {ToFriendly summary} ({mariadb_code})' contoh: '8.231 baris — Referensi data hilang (1452)'. Tombol 'Lihat semua sebagai tabel' eskalasi ke flat paginated view (50/halaman, sortable kolom created_at + mariadb_code). Live count refresh via SSE 'progress' event saat session running — group counts re-computed client-side dari snapshot + delta. **Tidak ada full-text search** di pesan V1 (cost vs persona triage value rendah). Per-group fetch via API GET /api/sessions/{id}/logs?mariadb_code={code}&limit=50 (server-side filter, hindari client memory spike). Render bagian dari /sessions/{id} page existing.
acceptance_criteria:
GET /api/sessions/{id}/logs?mariadb_code=&limit=&offset= dengan filter+pagination
GET /api/sessions/{id}/logs/groups → [{mariadb_code, count, friendly_summary}]
shadcn <Accordion> render groups dengan format '{count} baris — {summary} ({code})'
Expand group → tabel 50 baris pertama (server-side fetched)
'Lihat semua sebagai tabel' → flat paginated view 50/page sortable
Live count refresh via SSE progress event (re-fetch /logs/groups debounced)
A11y: keyboard nav accordion, ARIA labels
Test: groups endpoint return aggregate by code
Test: filter endpoint per code
Test: live refresh saat SSE event masuk
Test: empty state (no failures) → friendly empty UI
File ≤100 baris (split components: GroupAccordion, FailureTable, FlatView)

title: Sync Run UI page (start/progress/cancel)
description: UI Sync Run flow per CONTEXT decisions. **Start trigger di Mapping Profile detail page** (tombol 'Mulai Sync' hanya muncul di profile status='ready'); klik trigger preflight → kalau lulus, POST /api/sessions, redirect ke /sessions/{id}. **Progress display: top-level counters only** (simpler implementation per chosen approach): '{processed}/{total} baris · {failed} gagal · sedang: {current_table}' + global progress bar tunggal (percentage = processed/total). Tidak ada per-table accordion (breakdown failures sudah ditangani oleh Sync Log UI slice terpisah). **Cancel button = primary action slot replace Start saat running** — tombol berubah dari 'Mulai Sync' → 'Batalkan' (destructive variant) saat status running; spinner 'Membatalkan…' antara klik dan SSE cancelled event. **Post-done behavior: auto-redirect ke /sessions/{id} detail page** (sudah di sana actually karena trigger redirect sebelumnya — di-update view ke 'completed state' dengan summary). web/lib/sse.ts: wrapper EventSource dengan auto-reconnect (exponential backoff 1s/2s/4s, max 30s), parse event types, emit ke React state. Loading skeleton, empty state (no session), error toast saat 409 conflict (single-session lock) atau preflight blocking. A11y: keyboard nav, focus ring, ARIA live region untuk counter updates, prefers-reduced-motion.
acceptance_criteria:
/profiles/{id} detail page: tombol 'Mulai Sync' hanya untuk status='ready'
Klik 'Mulai Sync' → run preflight → tampil DriftReport banner kalau blocking
Lulus preflight → POST /api/sessions → redirect /sessions/{id}
/sessions/{id} page render counters + progress bar dari SSE stream
Counters format: '{processed}/{total} baris · {failed} gagal · sedang: {current_table}'
Status running → tombol 'Batalkan' (destructive variant) di slot primary
Klik Batalkan → POST cancel → spinner 'Membatalkan…' → SSE cancelled → status final
Status done/cancelled/failed/interrupted → tombol 'Mulai Sync Baru' (redirect Start)
Status final 'cancelled' → badge netral + pesan {processed} baris di Destination
409 conflict → error toast dengan link ke session aktif
web/lib/sse.ts: EventSource wrapper dengan auto-reconnect exponential backoff
A11y: ARIA live region untuk counter, focus ring, keyboard accessible
Skeleton + empty + error states
File route ≤100 baris, push detail ke web/components/
Test: Vitest komponen happy path (mock SSE)
Test: Vitest komponen 409 conflict path
Smoke E2E (Playwright optional di slice ini): full flow Start → Progress → Done

title: SSE broker + progress/row_failed/done/cancelled events
description: internal/sse/broker.go: hub subscriber per sessionID. Channel buffered, drop slow client. internal/sse/events.go: tipe event (progress, row_failed, done, cancelled, error). GET /api/sessions/{id}/events Server-Sent Events stream: kirim 'snapshot' event (current counts dari sync_sessions + last 50 row failures dari sync_logs) saat connect, lalu live stream progress/row_failed/done/cancelled/error. **Tidak ada replay buffer** — source of truth = sync_sessions (counts di-update per chunk-commit *sebelum* publish event) + sync_logs. Reconnect / refresh tab = snapshot baru. Header Last-Event-ID **diabaikan** V1. Runner publish ke broker setelah commit chunk. Race detector tests wajib.
acceptance_criteria:
internal/sse/broker.go: Broker struct dengan Subscribe(sessionID), Publish(event)
internal/sse/events.go: 5 event types (progress/row_failed/done/cancelled/error)
GET /api/sessions/{id}/events SSE handler
Snapshot event saat connect: {counts, last_50_failures}
Live stream: counts update per chunk; row_failed per insert error
'done'/'cancelled' event terminate stream
Slow client: channel buffer overflow → drop subscriber (tidak block runner)
Reconnect = snapshot baru (no replay)
Last-Event-ID header diabaikan
Test (race detector ON): 100 concurrent subscribers + publish
Test: subscriber lambat di-drop, runner tidak block
Test: snapshot pada connect mid-session = current counts + last 50
Test: reconnect setelah disconnect = fresh snapshot
File ≤120 baris (broker.go + events.go + handler.go)

title: Per-row error → ToFriendly + sync_logs
description: internal/sync/errors.go: ToFriendly(mysqlErr) (userMsg, technicalMsg). Lookup berdasar MariaDB error code + parser regex untuk extract konteks (nama kolom, nilai, constraint) ke template Bahasa Indonesia. **Whitelist V1**: 1048 (column cannot be null), 1062 (duplicate entry — UNIQUE non-PK), 1264 (out of range), 1292 (incorrect value), 1366 (incorrect string value), 1406 (data too long), 1452 (FK constraint fail) — semua row errors. Connection errors **2002/2003/2006/2013** → SSE error event, **bukan** row log. Fallback generic untuk kode di luar whitelist. **1366 emoji hint**: pattern matching hex prefix \xF0\x9F (4-byte UTF-8 leading = emoji/supplementary plane) → friendly hint 'Nilai mengandung karakter khusus (emoji atau aksara non-Latin) yang tidak didukung kolom Destination. Minta admin Destination ubah charset kolom ke utf8mb4 dengan ALTER TABLE {tabel} CONVERT TO CHARACTER SET utf8mb4'. Generic 1366 → existing template. Identifier code English, message BI; no i18n V1. sync_logs table: id, session_id (FK CASCADE), destination_table, pk_json, problem_column, source_value, mariadb_code, technical_msg, friendly_msg, created_at. Runner connect logHook callback dari upsert slice ke ToFriendly + repo.Logs.Insert. AUTO_INCREMENT collision (1062 UNIQUE non-PK seperti email) template per CONTEXT: 'Baris bertabrakan dengan data yang sudah ada di Destination pada kolom unik {key} (nilai {val}). Kemungkinan ada baris di Destination yang bukan berasal dari Source'.
acceptance_criteria:
005_sync_logs.sql migration (FK CASCADE ke sync_sessions)
internal/sync/errors.go: ToFriendly map 7 row error codes
Connection errors 4 codes → ErrorCategory.Connection (bukan row)
1366 emoji-pattern detection → emoji-specific hint dengan ALTER TABLE snippet
1062 UNIQUE non-PK template menyebut kemungkinan baris non-Source
Generic fallback untuk kode di luar whitelist
internal/repo/logs.go Insert + ListBySession + CountByCode
Runner logHook bridge upsert per-row error → ToFriendly → repo.Logs.Insert
Test: setiap whitelist code → friendly message dengan placeholder ter-extract
Test: emoji byte pattern → emoji hint, non-emoji 1366 → generic
Test: connection error tidak masuk sync_logs
Test: pk_json composite ter-serialize benar
File ≤120 baris (split errors.go + templates.go)

title: Cooperative Cancel (chunk-boundary)
description: POST /api/sessions/{id}/cancel idempotent → trigger context.Cancel() di runner. **Cooperative cancel di chunk boundary** per ADR-0003: chunk yang sudah BEGIN selalu commit penuh. Cancel hanya mencegah fetch chunk berikutnya, bukan abort transaksi yang sedang ter-execute. **Tidak ada tx.Rollback() path** di runner V1; chunk in-flight selesai normal (commit atau row-level error log), runner exit loop saat ctx.Err() != nil sebelum SELECT chunk berikutnya. Latency Cancel = sisa durasi chunk in-flight (~ratusan ms–detik). Status final = 'cancelled' (beda semantik dari 'interrupted' = system event connection drop / app crash, dan 'failed' = hard error). **Tidak ada rollback**: baris yang sudah ter-commit di Destination tetap ada (Source-wins UPSERT + chunk autocommit). UI: tombol Cancel mid-sync, spinner 'Membatalkan…' antara klik dan SSE cancelled event, badge netral + pesan '{processed} baris sudah masuk Destination, hapus manual jika perlu'.
acceptance_criteria:
POST /api/sessions/{id}/cancel idempotent (multiple call = no-op)
context.Cancel() trigger di runner
Chunk in-flight commit normal (no Rollback)
ctx.Err() check **sebelum** SELECT chunk berikutnya
Status update ke 'cancelled' setelah loop exit
SSE event 'cancelled' payload {processed, failed, cancelled_at}
UI tombol Cancel mid-sync, spinner 'Membatalkan…'
UI status final: badge netral + pesan {processed} baris masuk Destination
Test: cancel mid-chunk → chunk commit normal → status cancelled
Test: cancel sebelum chunk berikut → no extra fetch
Test: cancel idempotent (2x call OK)
Race detector ON

title: Sync runner + session lifecycle + global single-session lock
description: internal/sync/runner.go orchestrate per-session sync. sync_sessions table dengan kolom: id, profile_id, profile_snapshot_json (frozen {selection, rules, source_connection_id, destination_connection_id, profile_id} saat session start; credentials NOT snapshot — di-decrypt runtime), status enum **running | done | interrupted | failed | cancelled**, started_at, ended_at, rows_processed, rows_failed, current_table. Runner read snapshot (bukan profile aktif) untuk lindungi dari race mid-session. Counts di-update per chunk-commit *sebelum* publish event. **Single-session global**: package-level sync.Mutex + repo.SyncSessions.AnyRunning() check di POST /api/sessions → return **409 Conflict** ramah {error_friendly, conflict_session_id, conflict_profile_name} kalau ada session aktif. Bootstrap (internal/db/bootstrap.go) mark row status='running' zombie (crash/SIGKILL) jadi 'interrupted' sebelum runner accept request baru. Tidak ada auto-queue. Resume tidak didukung V1 — Session non-done → user mulai Session baru fresh (idempotensi UPSERT cover re-run). API: POST /api/sessions {profile_id} → start (validate ready + run preflight first), GET /api/sessions list, GET /api/sessions/{id} detail dengan profile_snapshot_json. UI Session Detail render snapshot + badge 'profile sudah berubah' kalau hash snapshot ≠ hash profile aktif. Lihat ADR-0008/0019/0020.
acceptance_criteria:
004_sync_sessions.sql migration dengan 5-value status enum
internal/repo/sessions.go CRUD + AnyRunning() + ZombiesToInterrupted()
internal/sync/runner.go: Run(ctx, sessionID) goroutine
profile_snapshot_json frozen di session start (bukan referensi live)
package-level sync.Mutex single-session global
POST /api/sessions: ready check → preflight → 409 jika AnyRunning, else 202 + sessionID
GET /api/sessions list + GET /api/sessions/{id} detail
Bootstrap zombie cleanup: status='running' di startup → 'interrupted' + ended_at
UI Session Detail render snapshot + badge 'profile berubah' (compare hash)
Test: AnyRunning lock = 409 dengan friendly body
Test: zombie cleanup pada bootstrap
Test: profile edit mid-session tidak affect runner (snapshot stable)
Test: status transitions running→done, running→failed
Race detector ON wajib (-race)
File ≤120 baris (split runner.go + session_repo.go)

title: Whole-table chunked Source-wins UPSERT
description: internal/sync/upsert.go: **Whole-table mode** — SELECT * dari Source untuk seluruh tabel di Selection Set (closed under FK via Closure Advisor), upsert ke Destination dalam chunked batch **500–1000 baris**. INSERT ... ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE dengan PK eksplisit dari Source (preserve PK, AUTO_INCREMENT Destination diabaikan). UPDATE branch hanya menyentuh kolom yang di-pair (Skip = tidak masuk INSERT list dan UPDATE clause; Default DB = INSERT DEFAULT + UPDATE col=DEFAULT(col); Kosongkan/NULL = INSERT NULL + UPDATE col=NULL; Konstanta = literal value; Source column = Source value; Rule = transformed value via internal/rules). Eksekusi dalam topological order (parents dulu) dari closure_advisor output. Belum ada session lifecycle / SSE / cancel di slice ini — function murni input(profile, source schema, dest schema, conn pair) → result counts. Per-row failure di-log via callback (logHook func) yang slice berikutnya hubungkan ke sync_logs.
acceptance_criteria:
internal/sync/upsert.go: ChunkSize const 500–1000 (configurable test)
INSERT ... ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE generated dynamically per Pairing
UPDATE clause skip kolom yang opsi 'Lewati'
Default DB: INSERT DEFAULT + UPDATE col=DEFAULT(col)
Kosongkan/NULL: INSERT NULL + UPDATE col=NULL
Konstanta: literal binding
Rule: applied via internal/rules.Translate sebelum bind
Topological order traversal Selection Set
Per-chunk transaction (BEGIN/COMMIT)
Per-row error → logHook callback (interface)
Idempoten: re-run pada tabel yang sudah sync = no-op (UPSERT cocok PK)
Test: 1 tabel 2000 baris → 2-4 chunks ter-execute
Test: idempoten (run 2x, count rows unchanged)
Test: Source-wins (UPDATE existing row di Destination dengan nilai Source)
Test: opsi 'Lewati' preserve nilai Destination existing
Test: opsi 'Default DB' reset ke server DEFAULT
Test: Rule transform applied
Test: composite PK ter-handle
File ≤120 baris (split sql_builder.go vs executor.go kalau perlu)

title: Preflight (schema drift detection both sides)
description: internal/sync/preflight.go: hybrid pre-flight struktural + runtime type, **berlaku Source + Destination**. Saat user klik Start, re-introspect kedua DB dan diff terhadap snapshot kolom di mapping_profiles.selection_json (per tabel: {name, is_pk, is_paired, side}, tanpa tipe). **Blocking Destination**: paired column missing, PK column missing/berubah, table missing, kolom baru NOT NULL tanpa DEFAULT, kolom dengan opsi 'Default DB' kehilangan DEFAULT-nya. **Blocking Source**: paired Source column missing (rename/drop) — pesan 'Kolom Source {tabel}.{kolom} tidak ditemukan. Mungkin telah di-rename atau dihapus. Buka Mapping Profile dan pilih ulang sumber kolom.', Source table missing. **Auto-handled Destination**: kolom baru nullable, kolom baru dengan DEFAULT, type widened. **Auto-handled Source**: kolom baru tidak referenced di Pairing → skip. Type narrowed (VARCHAR(100)→20, INT→SMALLINT) **tidak** ditangkap pre-flight V1 — runtime per-baris via 1406/1264/1366. **Tidak ada heuristik rename detection** — user explicit pilih ulang di Builder. Pesan via ToFriendlyDrift (jalur terpisah dari ToFriendly row-formatter), banner pre-start. Tidak ada flag bypass V1. Asumsi profile sudah 'ready' (validator structural sudah lulus di builder layer; preflight fokus drift, tidak ulangi).
acceptance_criteria:
internal/sync/preflight.go: Preflight(profileID) → DriftReport{blockingDest, blockingSource, autoHandled}
Diff vs selection_json snapshot per tabel (re-introspect kedua side)
Blocking Destination: paired missing, PK missing/changed, table missing, new NOT NULL no-default, Default DB lost DEFAULT
Blocking Source: paired Source col missing, Source table missing
Auto-handled: nullable new col, default new col, type widened, irrelevant new Source col
ToFriendlyDrift template per kategori dengan placeholder {tabel}/{kolom}
Pre-start API GET /api/profiles/{id}/preflight return drift report
UI banner pre-start: blocking → red banner block tombol Start; auto-handled → kuning info-only
No bypass flag V1
Test: drop Destination paired column → blocking
Test: rename Source column → blocking dengan pesan rename hint
Test: add nullable column ke Destination → auto-handled
Test: type widened (VARCHAR(50)→100) → auto-handled
Test: type narrowed (VARCHAR(100)→20) → NOT detected (runtime fallback)
File ≤120 baris (split blocking.go vs autohandled.go kalau perlu)

title: Cross-profile collision check on save
description: Saat save Mapping Profile (draft→ready transition), internal/repo/mapping_profiles.go cek overlap Selection Set (post-Closure-Advisor expansion) dengan profile lain yang status='ready' DAN destination_connection_id sama. Overlap non-kosong → hard-fail dengan ToFriendlyCollision(conflicts) yang kembali daftar tabel + nama profile pemilik (mis. 'Tabel customers sudah dipakai profile "Sync Pelanggan". Dua profile tidak boleh menulis ke tabel Destination yang sama'). Self-update mengecualikan diri sendiri dari query (UPDATE existing profile = OK). Tidak ada bypass V1; user yang butuh multi-Source merge harus pakai dua Destination terpisah. Mencegah dua Source menulis ke tabel Destination yang sama (akan saling menimpa via Source-wins UPSERT).
acceptance_criteria:
internal/repo/mapping_profiles.go: HasCollision(profileID, destID, selection) → []Conflict
ToFriendlyCollision(conflicts) → BI awam dengan nama profile + tabel
Cek hanya terhadap profile lain status='ready' (draft di-ignore, self di-exclude)
Block draft→ready transition dengan inline error
API response 409 dengan body {error_friendly, conflicts}
UI: dialog error dengan list profile pemilik + tombol 'Buka profile yang konflik'
Test: overlap dengan profile ready lain → block
Test: overlap dengan profile draft → allow (draft tidak count)
Test: self-update tidak self-block
Test: no overlap → allow
Test: multiple conflicts ter-list semua

title: Rule editor + 5 whitelisted rule types + live Sample Preview
description: internal/rules/dsl.go: tipe Rule whitelisted V1 — cast (target_type), enum_map (lookup table source→dest values, fallback strategy), regex_replace (pattern, replacement), string_op (trim|upper|lower|substring), date_format (input_layout, output_layout, on_parse_error: null|keep_original_string|fail_row). **Maksimal satu Rule per pairing** (no chaining). **Unconditional** (no IFTTT branching). PK column tidak boleh punya Rule (validator di builder slice sebelumnya sudah enforce). internal/rules/translate.go: Rule → func(row map[string]any) map[string]any. internal/rules/validate.go: validate Rule sebelum simpan (struktur DSL benar, regex compile OK, layout date_format parseable). Rules disimpan flat JSON di mapping_profiles.rules_json key='<dest_table>.<dest_col>'. UI Rule editor: shadcn <Dialog> terpisah dari builder utama, tombol 'Tambahkan aturan' di kolom Detail row pairing. **Live Sample Preview panel** di bawah form Rule: tabel dua kolom 'Nilai Source → Hasil' dengan **5 distinct values + 1 NULL row**. Source: SELECT DISTINCT col FROM src.t WHERE col IS NOT NULL LIMIT 5 + 1 hard-coded NULL, query saat dialog open (cache per dialog session, tidak persist). Translasi client-side via endpoint stateless POST /api/preview/rule {rule_dsl, source_connection_id, table, column} → [{source_value, dest_value, status: 'ok'|'error', error_friendly?}]. **Debounce 300ms** sejak user terakhir edit DSL. Per-row error → cell 'Hasil' tampil pesan ramah, tidak block save Rule (runtime fallback). Spinner di panel preview, tidak block tombol Save Rule. Endpoint stateless: tidak menyentuh mapping_profiles, tidak persist sample value. Date_format: time.ParseInLocation(layout, val, time.UTC); tooltip 'Waktu dianggap UTC'.
acceptance_criteria:
internal/rules/dsl.go: 5 Rule types ter-define dengan struct tag JSON
internal/rules/translate.go: Translate(rule) → func(row) row, 5 ops di-implement
internal/rules/validate.go: validate per type (regex compile, date layout, enum map non-empty, dll)
mapping_profiles.rules_json flat key '<table>.<column>'
Rule editor Dialog dengan form per type (conditional render)
Sample Preview panel: 5 distinct + 1 NULL, live update debounce 300ms
POST /api/preview/rule stateless endpoint
Per-row error tampil ramah, tidak block Save
Save Rule allowed walau preview ada error
date_format: parse UTC, tooltip 'Waktu dianggap UTC'
on_parse_error 3 mode: null/keep_original_string/fail_row
Test: tiap operator unit test (cast, enum_map, regex_replace, string_op, date_format)
Test: validate negative cases (regex tidak compile, layout invalid, enum_map empty)
Test: preview endpoint return [{source, dest, status}]
Test: max 1 Rule per pairing enforced di repo
File ≤100 baris masing-masing (split per operator kalau perlu)

title: Column Pairing builder (per-table tabs UI)
description: UI builder per ADR-0012 (Mapping Builder UI low-build-cost). Layout: shadcn <Tabs> + <ScrollArea> sidebar — satu tab = satu Destination table. **Tab order: topological (parents first per Closure Advisor execution order)** — supaya user lihat dependency flow natural. Body = HTML <Table> dengan kolom: Kolom Destination | Sumber nilai | Detail | Status. **PK column visual: 🔑 icon prefix di cell 'Kolom Destination'**. Sumber nilai = satu shadcn <Select> grouped (group 'Kolom Source' + group 'Opsi khusus': Konstanta, Kosongkan/NULL, Default DB, Lewati). Pilih 'Konstanta' → reveal text input. Auto-match (name case-insensitive + tipe kompatibel) → row putih + badge 'Auto' abu-abu. Unresolved → row kuning muda + badge 'Isi' oranye. Counter 'X dari Y belum diisi' di header tab. **'Tandai siap dipakai' button di footer action bar** (sticky bottom), disabled saat counter > 0 atau structural validator fail. Builder-time validator (internal/repo/mapping_profiles.go): PK Destination wajib di-pair ke Source (bukan Constant/NULL/Default/Skip), PK tidak boleh punya Rule, kolom NOT NULL no-default tidak boleh 'Kosongkan/NULL' atau 'Lewati' (NOT NULL ber-DEFAULT boleh 'Lewati'). Edit profile 'ready' yang merusak invariant → otomatis turun ke 'draft' dengan dialog konfirmasi. **Drag-drop di-skip V1**. Type-mismatch warning **tidak** di builder (di Preflight). Stack: shadcn Tabs/ScrollArea/Table/Select/Input/Badge/Button. Semantik UPSERT per opsi (ADR-0023): Kosongkan/NULL = INSERT NULL + UPDATE col=NULL; Default DB = INSERT DEFAULT + UPDATE col=DEFAULT(col); Lewati = kolom dihilangkan dari INSERT + UPDATE tidak menyentuh.
acceptance_criteria:
UI /profiles/{id} builder lengkap dengan Tabs sidebar + Table body
Tab order topological (parents first dari Closure Advisor)
PK column ditandai 🔑 prefix di nama
Sumber nilai = grouped Select (Kolom Source group + Opsi khusus group)
Auto-match feedback: row putih + badge 'Auto' abu-abu (no animation)
Unresolved feedback: row kuning muda + badge 'Isi' oranye
Counter 'X dari Y belum diisi' per tab di header
'Tandai siap dipakai' button **di footer action bar sticky bottom**, disabled saat ada unresolved atau validator fail
Validator (repo): PK harus pair ke Source (block draft→ready)
Validator: PK tidak boleh punya Rule (block draft→ready)
Validator: NOT NULL no-default + (Kosongkan/Lewati) → block draft→ready
Validator: NOT NULL with DEFAULT + Lewati → allowed
Edit ready profile yang break invariant → dialog konfirmasi → status turun ke draft
Status badge: Draft (abu-abu) / Siap (hijau)
Test: validator tiap aturan structural (positive + negative)
Test: tab order = topological order dari Closure Advisor output
Test: edit ready → break → dialog → draft transition
File route /profiles/{id} ≤100 baris, push ke web/components/

title: Closure Advisor (compile-time FK closure expansion)
description: internal/sync/closure.go: hitung Dependency Closure dari Selection Set memakai **dual-side FK** (gabungan FK Source schema ∪ FK Destination schema) — supaya skenario 'Destination punya FK yang Source tidak punya' tidak meledak runtime. Build DAG dari schema introspection kedua sisi, ekspansi BFS dari Selection Set ke semua induk transitif. Topological sort untuk eksekusi order (induk dulu). Closure di-jalankan dua kali per CONTEXT: (1) saat user simpan profile sebagai 'ready' — selection_json di-freeze dengan role per tabel ({name, role: 'user_selected' | 'advisor_added'}); (2) saat user klik Start — re-introspect, hitung ulang, deteksi schema drift (drift detection slice terpisah). Closure expand → dialog wajib confirm; shrink (table user remove dari Selection Set padahal masih di-reference) → info ringan, lanjut. Cycle detection eksplisit (FK loop A→B→A) → error friendly 'Skema FK punya siklus, tidak bisa di-sync, hubungi admin Source'. UI: dialog ekspansi tampilkan list tabel yang akan ditambahkan (advisor_added) + 'Lanjutkan / Batal'.
acceptance_criteria:
internal/sync/closure.go: Expand(selection, sourceSchema, destSchema) → ([]TableWithRole, error)
Dual-side FK union DAG (gabungan FK kedua sisi)
Topological sort untuk execution order
Cycle detection → friendly error
Save 'ready': selection_json di-freeze sebagai array {name, role}
Save 'ready': dialog ekspansi muncul kalau ada advisor_added
Save 'ready': dialog shrink (info-only) kalau ada removal
Test: depth ≥3 FK chain ter-ekspansi semua
Test: FK hanya di Destination ter-include
Test: cycle detection (A→B→A) error eksplisit
Test: topological order parents before children
Test: idempoten (re-expand sama input = sama output)
**File ≤120 baris (split graph.go + expand.go kalau perlu)**
notes:
Blocked by: mariadb-magic-vj0
Catatan: 'JIT Parent Sync' di PRD legacy = Closure Advisor di V1, tidak ada rekursi runtime.

title: Mapping Profile CRUD with draft status
description: mapping_profiles table: id, name, source_connection_id, destination_connection_id, selection_json (NULL di draft, frozen array nama tabel di ready), rules_json (flat object key='<dest_table>.<dest_col>' → rule DSL), status ('draft' | 'ready'), created_at, updated_at. internal/repo/mapping_profiles.go CRUD. API: POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/profiles. UI: builder skeleton page (/profiles/{id}) yang memungkinkan user pilih Source connection, Destination connection, dan Selection Set (multi-select dari list tabel hasil schema endpoint). Belum ada Column Pairing builder di slice ini — hanya skeleton dengan Selection Set + status draft. Tombol 'Simpan sebagai draft' selalu enabled. Validasi structural baru di-check saat draft→ready transition (slice berikutnya).
acceptance_criteria:
003_mapping_profiles.sql migration
internal/models/mapping_profile.go struct
internal/repo/mapping_profiles.go CRUD
API CRUD /api/profiles (POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE)
GET /api/profiles return list dengan badge status
GET /api/profiles/{id} return full profile JSON
/profiles route + /profiles/new + /profiles/{id} skeleton
Form: nama profile, Source connection picker, Destination connection picker, multi-select tabel
'Simpan sebagai draft' tombol selalu enabled (tanpa validator)
Status badge Draft (abu-abu)
Test: repo CRUD dengan in-memory SQLite
Test: API handler tests pakai httptest

title: Schema introspection endpoint
description: internal/mariadb/introspect.go: query INFORMATION_SCHEMA untuk list tabel, kolom (name, type, nullable, default, character_set, collation), PK columns, FK relations (constraint name, columns, referenced_table, referenced_columns). Return struct rapi siap di-marshal JSON. Endpoint GET /api/connections/{id}/schema mengembalikan full schema snapshot (tables → columns + pk + fks). Cache per-connection di memori dengan TTL pendek (mis. 30 detik) untuk menghindari hammer Source saat Builder open. Schema response = sumber tunggal untuk Mapping Builder + Closure Advisor + Preflight.
acceptance_criteria:
internal/mariadb/introspect.go: Tables, Columns, PKs, FKs query lengkap
Struct response: []TableSchema{Name, Columns, PK, FKs}
GET /api/connections/{id}/schema endpoint
In-memory TTL cache 30 detik per connection
Test pakai testcontainer MariaDB (atau mock SQL responses) untuk skema dengan FK chain depth ≥3
Test: column charset+collation ter-capture
Test: composite PK ter-capture sebagai []string
Test: cache hit dalam 30 detik tidak re-query DB

title: Connection CRUD + Test+Save split UI
description: Connections table dengan kolom standard (host, port, user, password_ciphertext, db, label) + last_test_at, last_test_status (untested|ok|failed), last_test_error_friendly. internal/repo/connections.go (CRUD pakai database/sql + prepared stmt; helper scanRow/execTx di repo/common.go). internal/mariadb/pool.go: dial timeout, ping retry, charset=utf8mb4 di DSN, time_zone='+00:00' di DSN params (re-applied per fresh connection di pool, ADR Connection pool sizing+UTC), SetMaxOpenConns(4), SetMaxIdleConns(2), SetConnMaxLifetime(30m), SetConnMaxIdleTime(5m). Form Tambah/Edit Koneksi punya **dua tombol independen**: 'Test Koneksi' (Open+Ping+USE db+SELECT 1, timeout 5 detik per step, tidak persist) dan 'Simpan' (persist apa adanya, tidak auto-test). Edit credential field → reset last_test_status ke untested; edit hanya label tidak reset. ToFriendlyHandshake map 1045 password salah, 1049 db tidak ditemukan, 2003 server tidak terhubung, 2002 timeout, 2005 host tidak dikenal — pesan **tanpa** password atau full DSN. UI list koneksi: badge 'Belum dites'/'OK'/'Gagal' + tombol 'Test Ulang'. Endpoint: POST /api/connections/test (pre-save), POST /api/connections/{id}/test (post-save, update kolom).
acceptance_criteria:
connections table migration (002_connections.sql) dengan kolom test status
internal/repo/connections.go CRUD lengkap, password_ciphertext via KeyProvider
internal/repo/common.go: scanRow + execTx helpers
internal/mariadb/pool.go: pool dengan utf8mb4 + UTC + sizing per CONTEXT
POST /api/connections/test (form payload, no persist)
POST /api/connections/{id}/test (post-save, update kolom)
ToFriendlyHandshake map 5 error code → BI awam, no creds in message
Form UI: dua tombol independen Test/Simpan + alert hasil test
Edit credential field → reset ke untested; edit label only → no reset
List UI: badge per status + tombol Test Ulang
Test: round-trip encrypt password (KeyProvider mocked)
Test: ToFriendlyHandshake tidak leak password/DSN
Test: pool re-apply time_zone+charset di reconnect
Test: handler test pakai httptest

title: Credential mode wizard + AES-GCM key provider
description: internal/crypto/ KeyProvider interface dengan dua impl: (a) OS keystore via go-keyring, (b) passphrase user + Argon2id KDF. Mode dipilih di dedicated route /onboarding/keamanan (bukan modal), disimpan di app_settings.key_mode (os_keystore | passphrase). Wizard muncul lazy saat user pertama klik 'Tambah Koneksi' — redirect ke route wizard kalau key_mode belum di-set, kembali ke form connection setelah selesai. Copy awam: 'Komputer ini hanya saya pakai sendiri' → keystore, 'Saya bawa di USB / komputer berganti-ganti' → passphrase. Detail teknis di collapsible. **Passphrase: minimum 5 karakter, tanpa wajib digit/mixedcase (V1 simplification).** Mode passphrase mewajibkan checkbox 'Saya sudah simpan passphrase di tempat aman, lupa = data hilang permanen' sebelum Lanjut aktif. **Unlock cadence: sekali per app launch** — passphrase di-prompt saat first credential read, di-decrypt ke in-memory cache, valid until process exit. Salt + KDF params di app_settings, ciphertext+nonce di connections.password_ciphertext. Probe keystore gagal di Linux tanpa keyring → fallback dialog ke passphrase. Re-key flow di Settings/Keamanan: satu transaksi (decrypt-old → encrypt-new → update key_mode), rollback atomic. Lupa passphrase = 'Reset semua koneksi' destructive button **hanya di Unlock dialog setelah failure** (bukan di Settings). Unlock salah 3x → rate-limit lock 60 detik. Lihat ADR-0024.
acceptance_criteria:
internal/crypto/provider.go: KeyProvider interface (Encrypt, Decrypt, Rekey)
internal/crypto/keystore.go: go-keyring impl
internal/crypto/passphrase.go: Argon2id KDF + AES-GCM
app_settings table dengan kolom key_mode, kdf_salt, kdf_params_json
/onboarding/keamanan route dengan dua card pilihan + collapsible detail teknis
Passphrase validator: ≥5 char (no other rules)
Checkbox 'saya simpan passphrase' wajib di-tick sebelum Lanjut aktif (mode passphrase)
Lazy redirect: klik 'Tambah Koneksi' di state key_mode=null → redirect ke /onboarding/keamanan
In-memory key cache: decrypt sekali per process, valid until exit
Unlock dialog muncul saat first credential read di mode passphrase
Wrong passphrase 3x → 60-detik rate limit, tombol disabled
'Reset semua koneksi' button **hanya** muncul di Unlock dialog (tidak di Settings)
Re-key flow di Settings/Keamanan dengan transaksi atomic
Probe keystore Linux fail → fallback ke passphrase
Test: encrypt+decrypt round-trip kedua mode
Test: re-key dari keystore ke passphrase dan sebaliknya
Test: passphrase salah → 3x rate limit

title: Single-instance lock per data directory
description: File magicsync.lock advisory file lock via github.com/gofrs/flock di folder yang sama dengan magicsync.db. Server tulis URL ke lock file saat startup. Instance kedua di folder sama → baca URL dari lock file, pkg/browser.OpenURL(url), exit 0 (user dapat tab baru, bukan error). Folder berbeda = lock berbeda = independen (pakai mode passphrase + DB terpisah, sah jalankan dua instance simultan). Lihat ADR-0022.
acceptance_criteria:
internal/lock/instance.go: acquire flock di {dataDir}/magicsync.lock
Server tulis URL aktif (http://127.0.0.1:PORT) ke lock file content
Instance kedua: lock acquire fail → baca URL dari file → OpenURL → exit 0
Folder berbeda → independent lock → boleh paralel
Lock dilepas saat process exit (defer)
Stale lock (process mati tanpa cleanup) → flock auto-release oleh OS
Test: spawn 2 process di folder sama, kedua exit 0 dan tab terbuka ke URL pertama
Test: 2 process di folder berbeda → keduanya jalan independen

title: SQLite migrations + self-heal
description: Plain numbered SQL files di internal/db/migrations/ (001_init.sql dst), embedded via go:embed. Tabel _migrations(version, applied_at) track applied. Bootstrap loop: list files, untuk version > MAX(_migrations.version), eksekusi dalam transaction, insert version row. PRAGMA integrity_check di startup; gagal → rename .bak (timestamped) + recreate fresh DB (Quarantine & Rebuild). 001_init.sql wajib SET PRAGMA auto_vacuum=INCREMENTAL (tidak bisa retroaktif). No down migrations V1 — rollback = .bak rebuild. No third-party lib (golang-migrate dll); ~30 baris hand-rolled.
acceptance_criteria:
internal/db/migrations/001_init.sql berisi 4 tabel PRD §6 + _migrations + auto_vacuum=INCREMENTAL
internal/db/bootstrap.go apply migrations dalam transaction, idempotent
internal/db/heal.go: integrity_check fail → rename .bak.YYYYMMDDHHMMSS + rebuild
Migration failure di tengah → transaction rollback, exit dengan pesan ramah, file asli tidak rusak
Test: migrate idempoten (run 2x = no-op)
Test: heal dengan file corrupt (truncate ke 100 byte) → quarantined + rebuild
Test: missing DB file → auto-create + apply semua migration
File ≤100 baris masing-masing

title: Bootstrap binary + embedded UI shell
description: Vertical slice fondasi: cmd/magicsync/main.go entrypoint, ephemeral 127.0.0.1 port via net.Listen tcp :0, pkg/browser.OpenURL auto-buka tab, fallback print URL ke stderr saat headless. go:embed web/out (placeholder Hello page). Bind 127.0.0.1 only (local-first). SQLite path resolution same-dir-as-binary via os.Executable + filepath.EvalSymlinks (ADR-0017). Read-only folder fail dengan pesan ramah stderr. Demoable: ./magicsync di folder kosong → browser terbuka ke halaman placeholder, log URL di stderr.
acceptance_criteria:
cmd/magicsync/main.go ≤100 baris
Binary listen di 127.0.0.1 ephemeral port (bukan 0.0.0.0)
URL ter-resolve via Listener.Addr() lalu di-pass ke pkg/browser.OpenURL
Fallback stderr saat OpenURL fail (no DISPLAY)
SQLite path = same-dir-as-binary, bukan CWD/APPDATA/XDG
Symlink di-resolve via filepath.EvalSymlinks
Read-only folder → friendly stderr error, exit non-zero
go:embed web/out terlayani di /
Smoke test: drop binary di folder kosong, jalankan, browser terbuka
